title: Rules of court
doc_html:
§1902.  Rules of court

A city court may adopt, and from time to time amend, rules for the conduct of judicial business before it.  

Added by Acts 1960, No. 32, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_text:
§1902.  Rules of court
A city court may adopt, and from time to time amend, rules for the conduct of judicial business before it.
Added by Acts 1960, No. 32, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
